title: XAU/USD just dropped 60+ points. I was short from the top. RR 3.24.
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Gold has been all over the place this week with macro volatility.

Most traders I know were either chasing or sitting out completely.

I was watching one zone on the 15M.

What the structure was showing : — Clear supply zone rejecting price (gray box) — EMA 200 acting as resistance from below — no reclaim — Lower highs forming inside the zone — buyers failing — Descending channel confirming bearish momentum

Setup before entry : Stop : 0.379% / $18,194 risk Target : 1.229% / $58,943 RR : 3.24

Result : +$472

Gold is one of the hardest markets to trade emotionally right now.

The structure doesn't care about the news. It just plays out.

Anyone else trading XAU this week or too volatile for your taste?

comments.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
comments.body:
For context — I run every setup through an AI tool I've been building before I enter.

Upload a chart screenshot, it reads the structure, identifies the key zones, scores the setup and gives SL/TP levels. Cuts the emotional bias completely.

This week on XAU/EUR/BTC alone : +$135 RR 2.15 / +$214 RR 3.15 / +$236 RR 2.0 / +$472 RR 3.24
